name: Darkstripe || Warrior Cats
description:
I have no quote to write... This is my inevitable downfall.

The "loyal" cat to ThunderClan who meets with the exiled ThunderClan warrior, now ShadowClan leader. Tigerstar.

Art: GrayPillow, but it seems they deleted it? Found it Here, Fun Fact! Pumakit still posts to this day! You should read the blog, it's good.

Limitless to allow the visualization of wounds, injuries, and etc. Nothing weird please..

NOT TESTED.

I haven't wrote anything in awhile, this will be really low quality compared to my other bots, have mercy.. I also have no great idea for a scenario. YES, YOU'RE FORCED, YOU HAVE NO CHOICE, YOU'RE FOLLOWING HIM THERE. But, you can say you're pretending to follow Tigerstar secretly and then leak to it Firestar. What a good spy you are.

-

UPD 1 - Lorebooks added yayyy (and a free scenario message)
